title: Notification No.12/2010-Cus(NT),dt. 17.2.2010
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 12 / 2010 - Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 17th February, 2010. 28 Magha, 1931 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Adjudication), Mumbai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on,- (i) the Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Strand Road, Kolkata; and (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, The Mall, Amritsar for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notices pertaining to M/s. Jindal Fine Industries, Dhandari Kalan, Campa Cola Lane, Ludhiana, D-51, Focal Point, Phase-V, Ludhiana and others issued vide, DRI F.No. 856(41) LDH/05/1196-1202, dated the 27thMay, 2008, by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, New Delhi. [F.No. 437/142/2009-Cus.IV] (Navraj Goyal) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
